catalog_row.ModelType: estimated nonlinear/stationary-scaled monetary DSGE; log-linear perturbation used for estimation
catalog_row.Category: estimated monetary DSGE with BGG financial accelerator and risk-news shocks
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: CEE nominal core; Calvo prices and wages; household habit; investment adjustment costs; variable utilization; BGG standard debt contract; time-varying idiosyncratic risk; anticipated and unanticipated risk shocks; financial observables

status_row.notes: First-pass bilingual derivation; article body delegates detailed equation list to online appendix/code; no Dynare runtime validation.

validation.check: English and Chinese F-number counts match

unresolved_issues: Full online-appendix formula list is not normalized locally for US_CMR14.
Stationary scaling of price/wage auxiliary equations, marginal cost, investment FOC, resource constraint, and monitoring cost should be checked against paper-side technical formulas.
Household budget equation has OCR damage around long-bond and tax notation.
Steady-state algorithm is not reconstructed; only source-backed targets and implementation cross-check values are recorded.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
